case_title: ALLEN S. LIU VS. CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY LIU, ALLEN S. AS TO DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-12-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-12-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ALLEN S. LIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BRIAN CAULEY, ASSISTANT CHEIF OF CLAIMS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-12-2021 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, ALLEN S. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
